Bash(NOTION_TOKEN="ntn_l48211614473o7ifWvjy6SOcpyVuU8dgAHfdnUjx0vy3w4" NOTION_PARENT_PAGE_ID="32c11f5d15e7806b99cfc464ca6fbd56" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from import_export import ExportImporter
import os

target_dir = ''D:/A-日常/有道云/weixinobU7VjswldrMDUXHaTIz2RO4R4Yk_2026-03-22_1774183709815/赚钱Inbox/场景差课程''

importer = ExportImporter\(\)

supported_ext = {''.md'', ''.pdf'', ''.html'', ''.htm'', ''.txt'', ''.note''}
files = []
for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(target_dir\)\):
    ext = os.path.splitext\(f\)[1].lower\(\)
    if ext in supported_ext:
        files.append\(os.path.join\(target_dir, f\)\)

print\(f''Found {len\(files\)} files to import''\)
for i, filepath in enumerate\(files, 1\):
    rel = os.path.relpath\(filepath, target_dir\).replace\(os.sep, ''/''\)
    print\(f''[{i}/{len\(files\)}] {rel}''\)
    ok = importer.push_file\(filepath, target_dir\)
    if not ok:
        print\(f''  [FAILED]''\)
    else:
        print\(f''  [OK]''\)

print\(f''\\nDone!''\)
")

import os

importer = ExportImporter\(\)

supported_ext = {''.md'', ''.pdf'', ''.html'', ''.htm'', ''.txt'', ''.note''}
files = []
for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(target_dir\)\):
    ext = os.path.splitext\(f\)[1].lower\(\)
    if ext in supported_ext:
        files.append\(os.path.join\(target_dir, f\)\)

print\(f''Found {len\(files\)} files to import''\)
for i, filepath in enumerate\(files, 1\):
    rel = os.path.relpath\(filepath, target_dir\).replace\(os.sep, ''/''\)
